name: vishu-love-message
description: A beautiful animated love message with heart tree and blooming flowers

scripts.build: echo 'Building static site...' && npm run copy-files
scripts.start: python -m http.server 3000 || python3 -m http.server 3000 || npx serve .
scripts.test: echo 'Testing love message app...' && node -e "console.log('❤️ Love app is ready!')"
scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('index.html')) throw new Error('Missing index.html'); console.log('✅ All files present');"
